prestazioni: Engine: N63B44O2 (4.4L V8 Twin-Turbo) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with **Garrett GTX4286R Gen II** turbos (64mm compressor, 86mm turbine) paired with **Precision Turbo 6266** wastegates, supporting 750whp on E85 with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management and **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors**.

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP76 XShift** 8-speed transmission with **Alpina TCU flash** and **South Bend Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** (2400Nm torque capacity) for launch control optimization, paired with a **Drexler Motorsport 3.91:1 limited-slip differential** for rear axle torque vectoring.

Suspension: **KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (G12-specific valving)** with **MCS 3-way adjustable dampers**, **H&R 25mm front/20mm rear sway bars**, and **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement plates** to eliminate chassis flex under 1.5G lateral loads.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (G12-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders** (2.5-inch flares) and **Vorsteiner G12 carbon fiber front splitter** (3-piece, adjustable dive planes) for -30mm ride height compatibility.

**Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** (dual 100mm outlets, quad tips) with **REMUS Valve Delete X-Pipe** for N63 backpressure optimization, paired with **VMR V810 21x10.5 ET35 wheels** (staggered, 285/30 front, 305/25 rear Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires).

**BMW M Performance Carbon Fiber Shadowline Grille** (painted **Frozen Portimao Blue II**) with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes (6000K CRI90)** and **OSS Designs G12 carbon fiber mirror caps**, complemented by **3M 1080 Satin Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars for weight reduction.
